blended.narrative: Mount Washington is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,642 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
